stdout:
Usage: gaia review calibration [OPTIONS] [PATH]

 Run calibration audit вЂ” compute О” = posterior - prior, rank by |О”|.

 Steps:
   1. Run BP to get posteriors
   2. Extract priors from package
   3. Compute О” = posterior - prior for each claim
   4. Sort by |О”| descending
   5. Optional: git diff to check if priors changed after seeing posteriors

 Large |О”| values (>0.15) indicate:
   - Evidence significantly updates belief
   - Prior may have been poorly calibrated
   - Potential for circular reasoning if prior was set after seeing evidence

 Exit codes:
   0  success
   1  user error
   2  system error

 Example:
     gaia review calibration
     gaia review calibration --top-k 10 --honesty
     gaia review calibration --format json > calibration.json

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®

в•­в”Ђ Options в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ --format   -f      [text|json]  Output format: text or json [default: text]  в”‚
в”‚ --top-k    -k      INTEGER      Number of top deltas to show [default: 20]   в”‚
в”‚ --honesty                       Check git diff for prior changes             в”‚
в”‚ --help                          Show this message and exit.                  в”‚
